title: Task Contract Schema
description: Schema for defining task contracts in the Codex -> Opencode serial workflow. This schema enforces implementation owner and model provider constraints to prevent role drift and unauthorized modifications.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the queued task.

node_id.description: Unique identifier for the atomic node.

implementation_owner.description: The only role allowed to modify files in the allowed scope. Must be exactly 'opencode_build_local'.

implementation_model_provider.description: The model provider required for implementation. Must be exactly 'local' to prevent hosted model replacement.

items.description: File paths or patterns that may be modified. Only opencode_build_local may modify these.

allowed_scope.description: List of paths/paths that may be modified by opencode_build_local only.

items.description: File paths or patterns that must NEVER be modified.

forbidden_scope.description: List of paths/paths that must NEVER be modified under any circumstances.

implementation_model.description: The specific model instance used for implementation.

codex_wrote_code.description: Must be false. Codex is forbidden from writing implementation code.

review_openrouter.description: The OpenRouter model used for read-only review reporting.

review_google.description: The Google AI Studio model used for second-opinion review when triggered.

review_models.description: Read-only review models. They cannot replace deterministic verification.
